name: pylzss

metadata.name: pylzss
metadata.summary: A Python library for decoding/encoding LZSS-compressed data.

documentation:
pylzss


A Python library for decoding/encoding LZSS-compressed data.

This project is based on yyogo's pylzss, I have only added CI.

## Installation - Install from [PyPI](https://pypi.org/p/pylzss): - ```python3 -m pip install pylzss``` - Local installation: - ```python3 -m pip install .```

modules.name: setup
documentation: Python package for LZSS encoding/decoding - setup.py
